calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Off Calendar

Hearing For Minor Compromise
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment, Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon,#6840.

Param Purewal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Theodore Lecar, father and guardian ad litem of Minor: Matthew Lecar.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00 in favor of claimant minor.

(See scanned document)

Status Hearing Scheduled on July 24, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into a blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
